name: Firefly
desc: A member of the Stellaron Hunters, clad in a set of mechanized armor known as "SAM." Her character is marked by unwavering loyalty and steely resolve.\nEngineered as a weapon against the Swarm, she experiences accelerated growth, but a tragically shortened lifespan.\nShe joined the Stellaron Hunters in a quest for a chance at "life," seeking to defy her fated demise.

1.name: In Reddened Chrysalis, I Once Rest
1.desc: When using the Enhanced Skill, ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the target's DEF. The Enhanced Skill does not consume Skill Points.

2.name: From Shattered Sky, I Free Fall
2.desc: While in Complete Combustion, using the Enhanced Basic ATK or the Enhanced Skill to defeat an enemy target or to <u>Break their Weakness</u> allows SAM to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>. This effect can trigger again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

3.name: Amidst Silenced Stars, I Deep Sleep
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Upon Lighted Fyrefly, I Soon Gaze
4.desc: While in Complete Combustion, increases SAM's Effect RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: From Undreamt Night, I Thence Shine
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: In Finalized Morrow, I Full Bloom
6.desc: While in Complete Combustion, increases SAM's Fire <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using the Enhanced Basic ATK or Enhanced Skill, increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

131001.name: Order: Flare Propulsion
131001.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of SAM's ATK to one designated enemy.
131001.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

131002.name: Order: Aerial Bombardment
131002.desc: Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of this unit's Max HP and regenerates a fixed amount of Energy equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of this unit's Max Energy. Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of SAM's ATK to one designated enemy. If the current HP is not sufficient, reduces SAM's HP to 1 when using this Skill. <u>Advances</u> this unit's next Action by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
131002.simple_desc: Consumes a portion of this unit's own HP to regenerate Energy. Deals Fire DMG to one enemy. <u>Advances</u> this unit's next Action.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

131003.name: Fyrefly Type-IV: Complete Combustion
131003.desc: Enters the Complete Combustion state, advances this unit's Action by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, and gains Enhanced Basic ATK and Enhanced Skill. While in Complete Combustion, increases SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>, and when using the Enhanced Basic ATK or Enhanced Skill, increases this unit's Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> and increases the Break DMG dealt by SAM to the enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting until this current attack ends.\nA countdown timer for the Complete Combustion state appears in the Action Order. When the countdown timer's turn starts, SAM exits the Complete Combustion state. The countdown timer has a fixed SPD of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>.\nSAM cannot use Ultimate while in Complete Combustion.
131003.simple_desc: Enters the Complete Combustion state. <color=#f29e38ff>Advances this unit's Action by <unbreak>100%</unbreak></color>. Gains <color=#f29e38ff>Enhanced Basic ATK</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Enhanced Skill</color>. Increases this unit's <color=#f29e38ff>SPD, Weakness Break Efficiency, and the Break DMG received by the enemy targets</color>, lasting until the countdown ends.

131004.name: Chrysalid Pyronexus
131004.desc: The lower the HP, the less DMG received. When HP is <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> or lower, the DMG Reduction reaches its maximum effect, reducing up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. During the Complete Combustion, the DMG Reduction remains at its maximum effect, and the Effect RES increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nIf Energy is lower than <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> when the battle starts, regenerates Energy to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Once Energy is regenerated to its maximum, dispels all <u>debuffs</u> on this unit.
131004.simple_desc: The lower the HP, the less DMG received. During the Complete Combustion state, the DMG Reduction effect remains at its maximum extent and Effect RES is increased. If Energy is lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> when the battle starts, regenerates Energy to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Once Energy is regenerated to its maximum, dispels all <u>debuffs</u> on this unit.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

131006.name: Attack
131006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131007.name: Δ Order: Meteoric Incineration
131007.desc: Leaps into the air and moves about freely for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds, which can be ended early by launching a plunging attack. When the duration ends, plunges and immediately attacks all enemies within a set area. At the start of each wave, applies a Fire Weakness to all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Then, deals Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of SAM's ATK to all enemies.
131007.simple_desc: Leaps into the air and moves about freely. After a few seconds of movement, plunges and attacks all enemies within range. At the start of <color=#f29e38ff>each wave</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>applies a Fire Weakness</color> to all enemies and deals Fire DMG to them.

131008.name: Fyrefly Type-IV: Pyrogenic Decimation
131008.desc: Restores HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of this unit's Max HP. Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of SAM's ATK to one designated enemy.
131008.simple_desc: Restores a portion of this unit's own HP and deals Fire DMG to one enemy.

131009.name: Fyrefly Type-IV: Deathstar Overload
131009.desc: Restores HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of this unit's Max HP. Applies Fire Weakness to one designated enemy, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Deals Fire DMG equal to (<unbreak>#5[f1]</unbreak> × Break Effect + <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>) of SAM's ATK to this target. At the same time, deals Fire DMG equal to (<unbreak>#6[f1]</unbreak> × Break Effect + <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>) of SAM's ATK to adjacent targets. The Break Effect taken into the calculation is capped at <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak>.
131009.simple_desc: Restores a portion of this unit's own HP. <color=#f29e38ff>Applies Fire Weakness</color> to one enemy. Deals massive Fire DMG to this target and Fire DMG to adjacent targets.

1.point_desc: During the Complete Combustion, attacking enemies that have no Fire Weakness can also reduce their Toughness, with the effect being equivalent to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original Toughness Reduction from abilities.

When SAM is in Complete Combustion with a Break Effect that is equal to or greater than <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, attacking a <u>Weakness-Broken</u> enemy target will convert the Toughness Reduction of this attack into 1 instance of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> <u>Super Break DMG</u>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000015.name: Super Break DMG
10000015.desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

1.point_desc: For every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of SAM's ATK that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases this unit's Break Effect by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>.

descs: Enhanced Skill can induce Fire Weakness to <color=#f29e38ff>all attack targets</color>
Causing Weakness Break in enemies <color=#f29e38ff>extends the duration of the Complete Combustion state</color>

1.point_desc: While in the Complete Combustion state, SAM's Break Effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using Enhanced Basic ATK or Enhanced Skill to inflict <u>Weakness Break</u> on a target, the Complete Combustion countdown is <u>delayed</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can trigger a maximum of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) during each Complete Combustion state.
